slides.body: A new study by Anaxi and Carnegie Mellon explores the complex valuation of data in modern AI systems. As AI components become reusable, clear rules for pricing and compensation are crucial for the evolving internet economy.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout with black/white base and blue accent. Left-aligned text, structured.
slides.source_topic_headline: Anaxi, Carnegie Mellon study AI data value, revenue models

slides.body: A TechRadar report suggests treating AI agents as junior engineers. This approach ensures safer and more effective use, acknowledging their capabilities while managing the probabilistic nature and potential inconsistencies of AI models.
slides.visual_direction: Clean, structured layout with black/white base and orange accent. Justified text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Treating AI Agents as Junior Engineers: Oversight for Productivity and Safety
